files_per_file_scope.src/renderer/game/systems/saveSystem.js: Bumped CURRENT_VERSION 5→6 (NOT 4→5 as spec said — v4→v5 was already taken by an unrelated soft-lock fix). Added migrateV5toV6 (initializes materialLog: [], derivedAnswers: {}). defaultSave() now declares materialLog/derivedAnswers/observations with v6 vocabulary comments. No other migrations modified.
files_per_file_scope.src/renderer/game/scenes/MaterialLabScen: Strictly additive. Added imports (saveGame, scaleStation, calipers, densitySlate, densityChart). Added SAMPLE_ITEM_IDS map (inventory aliases per material). Added _instrumentLayout(), createWorld() override (super then mount instruments), _mountLeftBayInstruments, _recordMass, _onCalipersClick, _onSlateAutoFill, _appendMaterialLogJournalOnce, override of _emitCompletionDialog (super then journal), getCompletionDialog (super then append 'take to Mr. Chen' line), getAlternateChartMode, drawAlternateChart. UTM rig (drawApparatus, drawSpecimenForSample, animateProgress, animateCompletion, _animateSplinter/_animateNeckSnap/_animateStretchTear), stress-strain chart config (getChartConfig, getChartAnnotations), readout (getReadoutFields), and material selector — all UNCHANGED. Instruments confined to x ≈ 60-200 (left bay, below START button at y > 440).
files_per_file_scope.src/renderer/game/scenes/LabRigBase.js: Strictly additive — zero deletions. Added override hooks getAlternateChartMode() (default null) and drawAlternateChart() (default no-op). Added setChartMode public method. Added _ensureModeToggle() (only renders button when subclass declares alt mode), _renderAlternateChart() (clears state, calls subclass), _altChartTexts cleanup tracker. Existing _renderChart preserved; alt-mode is a guard at the top that early-returns when active.
files_per_file_scope.src/renderer/game/scenes/NeighborhoodSce: Added import { interpolateStepText }. In _emitEnrichedDialog: pre-resolved {massTable}/{strengthTable} tokens against state for the immediate fallback emit AND the AI-enriched emit. Falls through unchanged when step.templateVars is absent (non-templated steps stay byte-identical).
files_per_file_scope.src/renderer/game/data/quests.js: Modified ONLY bridge_collapse.steps[quiz_weight] and [quiz_strength]: rewrote text as templates ({massTable}, {strengthTable}), added templateVars arrays. Choices unchanged in shape, label, or correct flags. quiz_choice UNTOUCHED. All other quests UNTOUCHED.
files_per_file_scope.src/renderer/game/GameContainer.jsx: Added import MaterialLogEntry. Replaced journal.map((entry, i) => {entry}) with a 3-arm dispatcher: string → existing div, { kind: 'materialLog' } → , else null. Backward compatible — all legacy string entries still render.

section_8_declaration.environmental_primitives_consulted: none — purely in-scene instrument system; reads no biome/terrain.
progression_primitives_updated: state.observations (existing, append-only) — vocabulary expanded: 'volume_known' (calipers click), 'masses_measured' (all 3 recorded), 'densities_calculated' (slate auto-fill), 'materials_lab_journaled' (idempotent journal-append guard).
state.materialLog (NEW) — array of { id, name, massGrams, recordedAt }. Appended by scaleStation onRecord callback. v6 default: [].
state.derivedAnswers (NEW) — { lightestMaterial?: string }. Written by densitySlate auto-fill. v6 default: {}.
state.journal (existing) — gains structured { kind: 'materialLog', label, rows, capturedAt } entries alongside legacy strings. GameContainer dispatcher handles both shapes.
section_8_declaration.act_1_to_3_scaling_strategy: The scale / calipers / density slate are act-agnostic. Act 2 simply adds entries to materialDatabase.MATERIALS — the scale auto-iterates MATERIAL_IDS and the slate auto-iterates state.materialLog. Act 3 (alien materials) reuses the materialLog shape and interpolateStepText template tokens; no act-conditional branches were introduced. The {massTable} token resolves uniformly across acts because it pulls from state.materialLog regardless of which materials are recorded. Verified via grep — no `if (act === N)` style conditionals exist in any new or modified file.

runtime_validation_protocol: 10-step acceptance criteria from agent spec: (1) Player walks into MaterialLabScene with all 3 samples in inventory. (2) Player clicks scale → mesquite button → sees 8.50 g → presses Record → green ✓ replaces button. (3) state.materialLog contains the entry; save survives reload. (4) Player records all 3 → density slate shows 3 entries with computed densities; auto-fill button highlights mesquite. (5) Density-mode chart toggle on the chart header → renders 3 bars, bar fill darker for materials the player has load-tested. (6) Player runs UTM tests on all 3 → completion dialog now says 'Take the data back to Mr. Chen' → notebook gains a structured 'Materials Test Lab — <date>' entry. (7) Player walks to Mr. Chen → at quiz_weight, dialog text shows the player's actual measurements (e.g. 'Mesquite: 8.50 g (0.85 g/cm³), Steel: 78.50 g (7.85 g/cm³), Copper: 89.60 g (8.96 g/cm³)'), not canonical 0.83/8.9/7.8. (8) Notebook (📓 button) shows 1 structured entry + any prior string entries. '📋 Copy' puts tab-separated text on clipboard. (9) Migration test loads a v5 save (note: spec said v4→v5; reality is v5→v6), asserts new fields after migration, asserts version=6. (10) v5 → v6 → reload round-trip works; no data loss.
deviations_from_spec: Save version: spec said v4→v5; actual implementation is v5→v6 because CURRENT_VERSION was already 5 from a prior unrelated soft-lock fix migration. Field shape and migration semantics match spec exactly — only the version-number slot shifted.

Layout: spec said scale buttons at (60/110/160, 400) but those coordinates collide with the existing START button at (60-220, 388-432). Resolved by placing instruments BELOW START in the lower-left bay (y 440-570, all still x < 200 per spec rule). Documented in MaterialLabScene._instrumentLayout() with rationale.

Strength rating: spec referenced materialDatabase.strengthPct, which does not exist. Derived strength % from ultimateStrengthMPa using a 600 MPa ceiling (steel ~75%, copper ~42%, mesquite ~17%). Documented in questTemplating.js with rationale comment.

Inventory item IDs: spec referenced 'mesquite_sample / steel_sample / copper_sample' but the actual item granted by the quest chain for copper is 'copper_ore_sample' (with 'surface_copper'/'deep_copper' as mine alternates). SAMPLE_ITEM_IDS map covers all aliases.

Static-only PASS until then.
